file.content:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Digest Generator API
  description: HTML email digest generation with Handlebars templating
  version: 1.0.0

paths:
  /digests/generate:
    post:
      summary: Generate email digest from classified emails
      description: |
        Create HTML email digest using Handlebars templates with category-specific
        scheduling and delivery options. Supports daily/weekly digest types.
      operationId: generateDigest
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                digestType:
                  type: string
                  enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
                dateRange:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/DateRange'
                categories:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: Categories to include (empty = all)
                recipientEmail:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                templateName:
                  type: string
                  default: 'default'
                customOptions:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    includeFullContent:
                      type: boolean
                      default: false
                    maxEmailsPerCategory:
                      type: integer
                      minimum: 1
                      maximum: 100
                      default: 50
                    sortBy:
                      type: string
                      enum: [date, confidence, urgency]
                      default: date
                    groupByThread:
                      type: boolean
                      default: true
              required: [digestType, recipientEmail]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Digest generated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestGenerationResponse'
        '400':
          description: Invalid request parameters
        '500':
          description: Generation error occurred

  /digests/{digestId}:
    get:
      summary: Get digest details and content
      description: |
        Retrieve generated digest with HTML content and metadata.
        Useful for preview and debugging templates.
      operationId: getDigest
      parameters:
        - name: digestId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
        - name: format
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [json, html]
            default: json
          description: Response format
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Digest details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestDetails'
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
                description: Raw HTML content
        '404':
          description: Digest not found

  /digests:
    get:
      summary: List recent digests
      description: |
        Get paginated list of generated digests with delivery status
        and basic metadata.
      operationId: listDigests
      parameters:
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            maximum: 100
            default: 20
        - name: offset
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 0
            default: 0
        - name: digestType
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
          description: Filter by digest type
        - name: deliveryStatus
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [pending, sent, failed]
          description: Filter by delivery status
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Digest list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestList'

  /digests/{digestId}/send:
    post:
      summary: Send digest via email
      description: |
        Deliver generated digest to recipient via SMTP.
        Includes retry logic and delivery tracking.
      operationId: sendDigest
      parameters:
        - name: digestId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                overrideRecipient:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Send to different recipient
                testMode:
                  type: boolean
                  default: false
                  description: Preview without sending
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Digest sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DeliveryResult'
        '400':
          description: Invalid delivery parameters
        '500':
          description: Delivery failed

  /templates:
    get:
      summary: List available digest templates
      description: |
        Get list of available Handlebars templates with metadata
        and usage statistics.
      operationId: listTemplates
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Template list
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TemplateList'

  /templates/{templateName}/preview:
    post:
      summary: Preview template with sample data
      description: |
        Render template with sample digest data for design and testing.
        Useful for template development and validation.
      operationId: previewTemplate
      parameters:
        - name: templateName
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                sampleData:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestData'
                overrideRecipient:
                  type: string
                  format: email
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Template preview
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  html:
                    type: string
                  metadata:
                    type: object
        '404':
          description: Template not found

  /schedule:
    get:
      summary: Get digest schedule configuration
      description: |
        Retrieve current digest scheduling configuration including
        category-specific timing and delivery preferences.
      operationId: getSchedule
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Schedule configuration
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestSchedule'

    put:
      summary: Update digest schedule configuration
      description: |
        Modify digest scheduling including category-specific timing,
        delivery preferences, and template assignments.
      operationId: updateSchedule
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestSchedule'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Schedule updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestSchedule'
        '400':
          description: Invalid schedule configuration

components:
  schemas:
    DigestGenerationResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        digestId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        generatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        digestType:
          type: string
          enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
        totalEmailCount:
          type: integer
        categoryCounts:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: integer
        templateUsed:
          type: string
        htmlSize:
          type: integer
          description: HTML content size in bytes
        generationTimeMs:
          type: number
        preview:
          type: object
          properties:
            subject:
              type: string
            snippet:
              type: string
              description: First 200 chars of content
      required: [digestId, generatedAt, digestType, totalEmailCount, templateUsed]

    DigestDetails:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        generatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        digestType:
          type: string
          enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
        recipientEmail:
          type: string
          format: email
        dateRange:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DateRange'
        categories:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestCategory'
        totalEmailCount:
          type: integer
        templateUsed:
          type: string
        htmlContent:
          type: string
          description: Full HTML content
        deliveryStatus:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, sent, failed]
        deliveredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        deliveryError:
          type: string
        metadata:
          type: object
          properties:
            generationTimeMs:
              type: number
            htmlSize:
              type: integer
            templateData:
              type: object
              description: Data passed to template
      required: [id, generatedAt, digestType, recipientEmail, categories, totalEmailCount]

    DigestList:
      type: object
      properties:
        digests:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestSummary'
        totalCount:
          type: integer
        limit:
          type: integer
        offset:
          type: integer
        hasMore:
          type: boolean
      required: [digests, totalCount, limit, offset, hasMore]

    DigestSummary:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        generatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        digestType:
          type: string
          enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
        recipientEmail:
          type: string
          format: email
        totalEmailCount:
          type: integer
        deliveryStatus:
          type: string
          enum: [pending, sent, failed]
        deliveredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        templateUsed:
          type: string
      required: [id, generatedAt, digestType, recipientEmail, totalEmailCount, deliveryStatus]

    DigestCategory:
      type: object
      properties:
        categoryName:
          type: string
        emailCount:
          type: integer
        emails:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestEmail'
        priority:
          type: integer
          description: Display order
        customSummary:
          type: string
          description: Optional human-readable summary
        templateData:
          type: object
          description: Category-specific template context
      required: [categoryName, emailCount, emails, priority]

    DigestEmail:
      type: object
      properties:
        emailId:
          type: string
        subject:
          type: string
        from:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailAddress'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        snippet:
          type: string
          description: First 150 chars of body
        confidence:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        categories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        urgency:
          type: string
          enum: [low, medium, high]
        includeFullContent:
          type: boolean
        customHighlights:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Key extracted information
        threadInfo:
          type: object
          properties:
            threadId:
              type: string
            messageCount:
              type: integer
            isFirst:
              type: boolean
            isLast:
              type: boolean
      required: [emailId, subject, from, date, snippet, confidence, urgency]

    EmailAddress:
      type: object
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: The actual email address
        name:
          type: string
          description: Display name (if provided)
        raw:
          type: string
          description: Original header value for debugging
      required: [email, raw]

    DigestData:
      type: object
      properties:
        digestType:
          type: string
          enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
        generatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        recipientEmail:
          type: string
          format: email
        dateRange:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/DateRange'
        categories:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DigestCategory'
        totalEmailCount:
          type: integer
        metadata:
          type: object
          description: Additional template context

    DateRange:
      type: object
      properties:
        start:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end:
          type: string
          format: date-time
      required: [start, end]

    DeliveryResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        digestId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        deliveredAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        recipientEmail:
          type: string
          format: email
        deliveryStatus:
          type: string
          enum: [sent, failed]
        messageId:
          type: string
          description: SMTP message ID
        deliveryTimeMs:
          type: number
        error:
          type: string
          description: Error message if failed
        retryCount:
          type: integer
      required: [digestId, deliveryStatus]

    TemplateList:
      type: object
      properties:
        templates:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/TemplateInfo'
        defaultTemplate:
          type: string
      required: [templates]

    TemplateInfo:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        lastModified:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        usageCount:
          type: integer
          description: Number of times used
        supportedDigestTypes:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
            enum: [daily, weekly, on_demand]
        requiredData:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Required data fields for template
        preview:
          type: object
          properties:
            thumbnailUrl:
              type: string
              format: uri
            sampleOutput:
              type: string
              description: Sample HTML snippet
      required: [name, description, supportedDigestTypes]

    DigestSchedule:
      type: object
      properties:
        dailyDigest:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ScheduleConfig'
        weeklyDigest:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ScheduleConfig'
        categorySpecificSchedules:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategorySchedule'
        globalSettings:
          type: object
          properties:
            timezone:
              type: string
              description: IANA timezone identifier
            defaultTemplate:
              type: string
            recipientEmail:
              type: string
              format: email
            enabled:
              type: boolean
      required: [dailyDigest, weeklyDigest, globalSettings]

    ScheduleConfig:
      type: object
      properties:
        enabled:
          type: boolean
        time:
          type: string
          pattern: '^([01]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$'
          description: Time in HH:MM format
        template:
          type: string
        categories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Categories to include
        minEmailCount:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
          description: Minimum emails required to send
      required: [enabled, time, template]

    CategorySchedule:
      type: object
      properties:
        digestType:
          type: string
          enum: [daily, weekly]
        priority:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          maximum: 10
          description: Category priority in digest
        template:
          type: string
          description: Category-specific template override
        customSummary:
          type: boolean
          description: Generate custom summary for category
      required: [digestType, priority]

content.content:
1→openapi: 3.0.0
     2→info:
     3→  title: Classification Engine API
     4→  description: Sophisticated multi-stage email classification engine with preserved n8n pipeline capabilities
     5→  version: 1.0.0
     6→
     7→paths:
     8→  /classify/batch:
     9→    post:
    10→      summary: Classify a batch of emails with parallel processing
    11→      description: |
    12→        Process multiple emails through the sophisticated multi-stage classification pipeline.
    13→        Preserves all pipeline stages: hard assertions, strong indicators, rule scoring,
    14→        attribute detection, attribute influence, disambiguation, multi-label selection, AI routing.
    15→      operationId: classifyBatch
    16→      requestBody:
    17→        required: true
    18→        content:
    19→          application/json:
    20→            schema:
    21→              type: object
    22→              properties:
    23→                emails:
    24→                  type: array
    25→                  items:
    26→                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailContent'
    27→                  maxItems: 100
    28→                sessionId:
    29→                  type: string
    30→                  format: uuid
    31→                  description: Classification session identifier
    32→                processingMode:
    33→                  type: string
    34→                  enum: [parallel, sequential]
    35→                  default: parallel
    36→                configVersion:
    37→                  type: string
    38→                  description: Configuration hash for reproducibility
    39→              required: [emails, sessionId]
    40→      responses:
    41→        '200':
    42→          description: Classification results with explainability traces
    43→          content:
    44→            application/json:
    45→              schema:
    46→                $ref: '#/components/schemas/BatchClassificationResponse'
    47→        '400':
    48→          description: Invalid input or configuration
    49→        '500':
    50→          description: Classification engine error
    51→
    52→  /classify/single:
    53→    post:
    54→      summary: Classify a single email with full explainability
    55→      description: |
    56→        Process single email through classification pipeline with detailed audit trail.
    57→        Useful for debugging and manual classification review.
    58→      operationId: classifySingle
    59→      requestBody:
    60→        required: true
    61→        content:
    62→          application/json:
    63→            schema:
    64→              type: object
    65→              properties:
    66→                email:
    67→                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailContent'
    68→                sessionId:
    69→                  type: string
    70→                  format: uuid
    71→                includeExplainability:
    72→                  type: boolean
    73→                  default: true
    74→                configVersion:
    75→                  type: string
    76→              required: [email, sessionId]
    77→      responses:
    78→        '200':
    79→          description: Single email classification with explainability
    80→          content:
    81→            application/json:
    82→              schema:
    83→                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SingleClassificationResponse'
    84→
    85→  /config/validate:
    86→    post:
    87→      summary: Validate classification configuration
    88→      description: |
    89→        Validate category configuration using Zod schema validation.
    90→        Ensures configuration integrity before classification execution.
    91→      operationId: validateConfig
    92→      requestBody:
    93→        required: true
    94→        content:
    95→          application/json:
    96→            schema:
    97→              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryConfiguration'
    98→      responses:
    99→        '200':
   100→          description: Configuration validation results
   101→          content:
   102→            application/json:
   103→              schema:
   104→                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ConfigValidationResponse'
   105→
   106→  /explain/{classificationId}:
   107→    get:
   108→      summary: Get detailed explainability trace for classification
   109→      description: |
   110→        Retrieve complete explainability trace including stage timings,
   111→        parallel execution mapping, and decision audit trail.
   112→      operationId: getExplainability
   113→      parameters:
   114→        - name: classificationId
   115→          in: path
   116→          required: true
   117→          schema:
   118→            type: string
   119→            format: uuid
   120→      responses:
   121→        '200':
   122→          description: Detailed explainability trace
   123→          content:
   124→            application/json:
   125→              schema:
   126→                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExplainabilityTrace'
   127→        '404':
   128→          description: Classification not found
   129→

file.content:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Classification Engine API
  description: Sophisticated multi-stage email classification engine with preserved n8n pipeline capabilities
  version: 1.0.0

paths:
  /classify/batch:
    post:
      summary: Classify a batch of emails with parallel processing
      description: |
        Process multiple emails through the sophisticated multi-stage classification pipeline.
        Preserves all pipeline stages: hard assertions, strong indicators, rule scoring,
        attribute detection, attribute influence, disambiguation, multi-label selection, AI routing.
      operationId: classifyBatch
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                emails:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailContent'
                  maxItems: 100
                sessionId:
                  type: string
                  format: uuid
                  description: Classification session identifier
                processingMode:
                  type: string
                  enum: [parallel, sequential]
                  default: parallel
                configVersion:
                  type: string
                  description: Configuration hash for reproducibility
              required: [emails, sessionId]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Classification results with explainability traces
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/BatchClassificationResponse'
        '400':
          description: Invalid input or configuration
        '500':
          description: Classification engine error

  /classify/single:
    post:
      summary: Classify a single email with full explainability
      description: |
        Process single email through classification pipeline with detailed audit trail.
        Useful for debugging and manual classification review.
      operationId: classifySingle
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                email:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailContent'
                sessionId:
                  type: string
                  format: uuid
                includeExplainability:
                  type: boolean
                  default: true
                configVersion:
                  type: string
              required: [email, sessionId]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Single email classification with explainability
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/SingleClassificationResponse'

  /config/validate:
    post:
      summary: Validate classification configuration
      description: |
        Validate category configuration using Zod schema validation.
        Ensures configuration integrity before classification execution.
      operationId: validateConfig
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryConfiguration'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Configuration validation results
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ConfigValidationResponse'

  /explain/{classificationId}:
    get:
      summary: Get detailed explainability trace for classification
      description: |
        Retrieve complete explainability trace including stage timings,
        parallel execution mapping, and decision audit trail.
      operationId: getExplainability
      parameters:
        - name: classificationId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            format: uuid
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Detailed explainability trace
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExplainabilityTrace'
        '404':
          description: Classification not found

components:
  schemas:
    EmailContent:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Gmail message ID
        threadId:
          type: string
        subject:
          type: string
        from:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailAddress'
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailAddress'
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailAddress'
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailAddress'
        date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        bodyPlain:
          type: string
        bodyHtml:
          type: string
        gmailLabels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        payload:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MessagePayload'
      required: [id, threadId, subject, from, date]

    EmailAddress:
      type: object
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: The actual email address
        name:
          type: string
          description: Display name (if provided)
        raw:
          type: string
          description: Original header value for debugging
      required: [email, raw]

    MessagePayload:
      type: object
      properties:
        partId:
          type: string
        mimeType:
          type: string
        filename:
          type: string
        headers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailHeader'
        body:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MessagePartBody'
        parts:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MessagePart'
      required: [mimeType, headers]

    EmailHeader:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          description: Header name (e.g., "From", "To", "Subject")
        value:
          type: string
          description: Raw header value
      required: [name, value]

    MessagePartBody:
      type: object
      properties:
        attachmentId:
          type: string
        size:
          type: number
        data:
          type: string
          description: Base64url encoded content

    MessagePart:
      type: object
      properties:
        partId:
          type: string
        mimeType:
          type: string
        filename:
          type: string
        headers:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/EmailHeader'
        body:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MessagePartBody'
        parts:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MessagePart'
      required: [partId, mimeType]

    BatchClassificationResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        sessionId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        results:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ClassificationResult'
        performanceMetrics:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/PerformanceMetrics'
        configVersion:
          type: string
        processingMode:
          type: string
          enum: [parallel, sequential]
      required: [sessionId, results, performanceMetrics]

    SingleClassificationResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        result:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ClassificationResult'
        explainabilityTrace:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ExplainabilityTrace'
        scoreBreakdown:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ScoreBreakdown'

    ClassificationResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        emailId:
          type: string
        primaryCategory:
          type: string
        secondaryCategories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        confidence:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        processedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        processingDurationMs:
          type: number
        aiRoutingUsed:
          type: boolean
        attributeContext:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeContext'
      required: [emailId, primaryCategory, confidence, processedAt]

    ExplainabilityTrace:
      type: object
      properties:
        sessionId:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        emailId:
          type: string
        hardAssertions:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/HardAssertionResult'
        strongIndicators:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/StrongIndicatorResult'
        ruleScoring:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/RuleEvaluationResult'
        attributeDetection:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeDetectionResult'
        attributeInfluence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeInfluenceResult'
        disambiguation:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DisambiguationResult'
        multiLabelSelection:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/MultiLabelResult'
        aiRouting:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AIRoutingResult'
        stageTimings:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number
        parallelExecutionMap:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: array
            items:
              type: string
        finalDecisionReason:
          type: string
        alternativeCategories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              category:
                type: string
              score:
                type: number
              eliminationReason:
                type: string

    ScoreBreakdown:
      type: object
      properties:
        emailId:
          type: string
        categoryScores:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: object
            properties:
              baseScore:
                type: number
              hardAssertionBonus:
                type: number
              strongIndicatorScore:
                type: number
              ruleScore:
                type: number
              attributeInfluenceScore:
                type: number
              finalScore:
                type: number
              parallelComputedComponents:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
              computationDurationMs:
                type: number
              cacheHits:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
        stageContributions:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: object
            properties:
              contribution:
                type: number
              confidence:
                type: number
              processingMode:
                type: string
                enum: [parallel, sequential]
              dependencies:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
        disambiguationApplied:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              categories:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
              rule:
                type: string
              scoreAdjustment:
                type: number
              reason:
                type: string

    AttributeContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        emailId:
          type: string
        urgency:
          type: string
          enum: [low, medium, high]
        domains:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        structuralPatterns:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        temporalSignals:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        detectionMetadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: object
            properties:
              detectedAt:
                type: string
                format: date-time
              confidence:
                type: number
              detectionMethod:
                type: string
                enum: [rule, pattern, ai, domain_lookup]
              parallelProcessed:
                type: boolean
              dependencies:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
        influenceApplications:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              targetCategory:
                type: string
              attributeUsed:
                type: string
              roleType:
                type: string
                enum: [CORE, PRIMARY_BOOST, SECONDARY_BOOST, DISAMBIGUATOR, FILTER]
              scoreImpact:
                type: number
              applicationReason:
                type: string

    CategoryConfiguration:
      type: object
      properties:
        version:
          type: string
          description: Semantic version
        hash:
          type: string
          description: Content hash for validation
        processing_config:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcessingConfig'
        schemaVersion:
          type: string
        validationPassed:
          type: boolean
        validationErrors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
      required: [version, processing_config]

    ProcessingConfig:
      type: object
      properties:
        version:
          type: number
        taxonomy_notes:
          type: string
        settings:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ProcessingSettings'
        category_signals:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategorySignals'
        confidence_thresholds:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/ConfidenceThresholds'
        multi_label_policy:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/MultiLabelPolicy'
        domain_signal_overrides:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: object
            properties:
              hard_include:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
              hard_exclude:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
              strong_include:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
              strong_exclude:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
        domain_signal_resolution:
          type: object
          properties:
            mode:
              type: string
            source:
              type: string
            notes:
              type: string
        top_level_categories:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/TopLevelCategory'
        attributes:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeSystem'
        attribute_relevance:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeRelevanceMatrix'
        ai_prompts:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/AIPromptSystem'
        feature_extraction_schema:
          type: object
          description: JSON Schema for AI feature extraction validation

    ProcessingSettings:
      type: object
      properties:
        initialization:
          type: object
          properties:
            apply_hard_assertions:
              type: boolean
            seed_category_scores:
              type: boolean
        rule_scoring:
          type: object
          properties:
            use_lexical_patterns:
              type: boolean
            apply_subtype_rules:
              type: boolean
            bounded_aggregation:
              type: boolean
        attribute_processing:
          type: object
          properties:
            detect_self_sent:
              type: boolean
            resolve_domains:
              type: boolean
            derive_context_flags:
              type: boolean
        attribute_influence:
          type: object
          properties:
            apply_bonuses:
              type: boolean
            apply_penalties:
              type: boolean
            enforce_caps:
              type: boolean
        disambiguation:
          type: object
          properties:
            pairwise_adjustments:
              type: boolean
            confidence_gap_threshold:
              type: number
        multi_label_selection:
          type: object
          properties:
            max_labels:
              type: number
            min_secondary_confidence:
              type: number
            allowed_combinations:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        ai_routing:
          type: object
          properties:
            high_confidence_threshold:
              type: number
            ai_required_threshold:
              type: number
            skip_ai_conditions:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string

    CategorySignals:
      type: object
      properties:
        hard_assertions:
          type: object
          properties:
            from_domains_ref:
              type: object
              properties:
                source_group:
                  type: string
                confidence:
                  type: string
            subject_prefixes:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            from_addresses:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        strong_indicators:
          type: object
          properties:
            from_domains_ref:
              type: object
              properties:
                source_group:
                  type: string
                confidence:
                  type: string
            subject_contains:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            body_contains:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        disambiguators:
          type: object
          properties:
            boost_if_present_attributes:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            suppress_if_body_contains:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            boost_if_absent_categories:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string

    ConfidenceThresholds:
      type: object
      properties:
        high_confidence:
          type: number
        medium_confidence:
          type: number
        low_confidence:
          type: number
        ai_classification_required:
          type: number
        manual_review_required:
          type: number
        secondary_label_min_gap:
          type: number

    MultiLabelPolicy:
      type: object
      properties:
        max_top_level_labels:
          type: number
        min_confidence_for_additional:
          type: number
        min_delta_primary_secondary:
          type: number
        allow_financial_actionable_copresence:
          type: boolean

    TopLevelCategory:
      type: object
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        subtypes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/SubtypeDefinition'
        ai_final_classification:
          type: object
          properties:
            category_description:
              type: string
            decision_criteria:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            exclusion_criteria:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string

    SubtypeDefinition:
      type: object
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        rule_based_classification:
          type: object
          properties:
            high_confidence:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/RulePattern'
            medium_confidence:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/RulePattern'
            low_confidence:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/RulePattern'
        derived:
          type: boolean
        derivation_logic:
          type: string

    RulePattern:
      type: object
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
          description: Field to match (subject, body, from.address, etc.)
        operation:
          type: string
          enum: [contains_any, starts_with, ends_with, regex_any, exists]
        values:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        weight:
          type: number

    AttributeSystem:
      type: object
      properties:
        schema:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeSchema'
        detectors:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/AttributeDetector'
        derived:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/DerivedAttribute'
        attribute_bonus_map:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: object
            additionalProperties:
              type: number

    AttributeSchema:
      type: object
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [enum, boolean]
        values:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: For enum types
        description:
          type: string

    AttributeDetector:
      type: object
      properties:
        attribute:
          type: string
        field:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        values:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DerivedAttribute:
      type: object
      properties:
        logic:
          type: string
        notes:
          type: string

    AttributeRelevanceMatrix:
      type: object
      additionalProperties: true
      description: Matrix mapping attributes to categories with roles (CORE, PRIMARY_BOOST, SECONDARY_BOOST, DISAMBIGUATOR, FILTER, STRUCTURAL, DERIVED_LINK, NEUTRAL)

    AIPromptSystem:
      type: object
      properties:
        feature_extraction:
          type: object
          properties:
            system_prompt:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            user_prompt:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
        final_classification:
          type: object
          properties:
            system_prompt:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string
            user_prompt:
              type: array
              items:
                type: string

    ConfigValidationResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        valid:
          type: boolean
        errors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        warnings:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        hash:
          type: string
          description: Configuration hash for version tracking

    PerformanceMetrics:
      type: object
      properties:
        totalDurationMs:
          type: number
        avgEmailDurationMs:
          type: number
        parallelStagesCount:
          type: number
        databaseBatchOps:
          type: number
        emailsProcessed:
          type: number
        errorsOccurred:
          type: number

    # Stage-specific result schemas
    HardAssertionResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        category:
          type: string
        assertion:
          type: string
        matched:
          type: boolean
        confidence:
          type: number

    StrongIndicatorResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        category:
          type: string
        pattern:
          type: string
        weight:
          type: number
        matched:
          type: boolean
        matchedText:
          type: string

    RuleEvaluationResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        category:
          type: string
        tier:
          type: string
          enum: [high, medium, low]
        rule:
          type: string
        score:
          type: number
        matched:
          type: boolean

    AttributeDetectionResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        attributeName:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string
        confidence:
          type: number
        detectionMethod:
          type: string
        parallelProcessed:
          type: boolean

    AttributeInfluenceResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        targetCategory:
          type: string
        attributeUsed:
          type: string
        roleType:
          type: string
        scoreImpact:
          type: number

    DisambiguationResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        categories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        rule:
          type: string
        decision:
          type: string
        scoreAdjustments:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: number

    MultiLabelResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        selectedCategories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        rejectedCategories:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              category:
                type: string
              reason:
                type: string
        coPresenceRulesApplied:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    AIRoutingResult:
      type: object
      properties:
        routedToAI:
          type: boolean
        reason:
          type: string
        aiCategory:
          type: string
        aiConfidence:
          type: number
        promptUsed:
          type: string
        processingTime:
          type: number

file.content:
# Tasks: [FEATURE NAME]

**Input**: Design documents from `/specs/[###-feature-name]/`
**Prerequisites**: plan.md (required), research.md, data-model.md, contracts/

## Execution Flow (main)

```
1. Load plan.md from feature directory
   → If not found: ERROR "No implementation plan found"
   → Extract: tech stack, libraries, structure
2. Load optional design documents:
   → data-model.md: Extract entities → model tasks
   → contracts/: Each file → contract test task
   → research.md: Extract decisions → setup tasks
3. Generate tasks by category:
   → Setup: project init, dependencies, linting
   → Tests: contract tests, integration tests
   → Core: models, services, CLI commands
   → Integration: DB, middleware, logging
   → Polish: unit tests, performance, docs
4. Apply task rules:
   → Different files = mark [P] for parallel
   → Same file = sequential (no [P])
   → Tests before implementation (TDD)
5. Number tasks sequentially (T001, T002...)
6. Generate dependency graph
7. Create parallel execution examples
8. Validate task completeness:
   → All contracts have tests?
   → All entities have models?
   → All endpoints implemented?
9. Return: SUCCESS (tasks ready for execution)
```

## Format: `[ID] [P?] Description`

- **[P]**: Can run in parallel (different files, no dependencies)
- Include exact file paths in descriptions

## Path Conventions

- **Gmail Automation Packages**: `packages/classification-engine/`, `packages/email-processor/`, `packages/webapp/`
- **Legacy Packages**: `packages/workflow-logic/` (extraction source), `packages/n8n-simulator/` (deprecated)
- **Configuration**: `config/` directory for email categorization rules and domain mappings
- **Database**: `database/` for PostgreSQL schema and migrations
- Paths shown below assume monorepo package structure - adjust based on plan.md structure

## Phase 3.1: Setup

- [ ] T001 Create project structure per implementation plan
- [ ] T002 Initialize [language] project with [framework] dependencies
- [ ] T003 [P] Configure linting and formatting tools

## Phase 3.2: Tests First (TDD) ⚠️ MUST COMPLETE BEFORE 3.3

**CRITICAL: These tests MUST be written and MUST FAIL before ANY implementation**

- [ ] T004 [P] Classification pipeline test in packages/classification-engine/tests/test_pipeline.js
- [ ] T005 [P] Explainability trace test in packages/classification-engine/tests/test_explainability.js
- [ ] T006 [P] Configuration validation test in packages/classification-engine/tests/test_config.js
- [ ] T007 [P] Gmail integration test in packages/email-processor/tests/test_gmail.js

## Phase 3.3: Core Implementation (ONLY after tests are failing)

- [ ] T008 [P] Classification engine stages in packages/classification-engine/src/pipeline.js
- [ ] T009 [P] Configuration schema in packages/classification-engine/src/config-schema.js
- [ ] T010 [P] Gmail API client in packages/email-processor/src/gmail-client.js
- [ ] T011 Batch processing orchestration in packages/email-processor/src/processor.js
- [ ] T012 Database persistence layer in packages/email-processor/src/database.js
- [ ] T013 Explainability trace generation in packages/classification-engine/src/explainability.js
- [ ] T014 Error handling and audit logging

## Phase 3.4: Integration

- [ ] T015 Connect classification engine to email processor
- [ ] T016 Database connection pooling with batch operations
- [ ] T017 Configuration loading and validation
- [ ] T018 Gmail API authentication and token management

## Phase 3.5: Polish

- [ ] T019 [P] Performance tests with parallel processing validation
- [ ] T020 [P] Classification accuracy validation against baseline
- [ ] T021 [P] Explainability trace validation tests
- [ ] T022 Remove duplication and optimize batch operations
- [ ] T023 Configuration integrity validation

## Dependencies

- Tests (T004-T007) before implementation (T008-T014)
- T008 blocks T011, T015
- T010 blocks T018
- Implementation before polish (T019-T023)

## Parallel Example

```
# Launch T004-T007 together:
Task: "Classification pipeline test in packages/classification-engine/tests/test_pipeline.js"
Task: "Explainability trace test in packages/classification-engine/tests/test_explainability.js"
Task: "Configuration validation test in packages/classification-engine/tests/test_config.js"
Task: "Gmail integration test in packages/email-processor/tests/test_gmail.js"
```

## Notes

- [P] tasks = different files, no dependencies
- Verify tests fail before implementing
- Commit after each task
- Avoid: vague tasks, same file conflicts

## Task Generation Rules

_Applied during main() execution_

1. **From Contracts**:
   - Each contract file → contract test task [P]
   - Each endpoint → implementation task
2. **From Data Model**:
   - Each entity → model creation task [P]
   - Relationships → service layer tasks
3. **From User Stories**:
   - Each story → integration test [P]
   - Quickstart scenarios → validation tasks

4. **Ordering**:
   - Setup → Tests → Models → Services → Endpoints → Polish
   - Dependencies block parallel execution

## Validation Checklist

_GATE: Checked by main() before returning_

- [ ] All contracts have corresponding tests
- [ ] All entities have model tasks
- [ ] All tests come before implementation
- [ ] Parallel tasks truly independent
- [ ] Each task specifies exact file path
- [ ] No task modifies same file as another [P] task

input.content:
# Tasks: Email Processing Architecture Modernization

**Input**: Design documents from `/workspaces/gmail-automation/specs/001-n8n-to-direct-migration/`
**Prerequisites**: plan.md (required), research.md, data-model.md, contracts/

## Execution Flow (main)

```
1. Load plan.md from feature directory
   → Extract: Node.js 18+, TypeScript 5.0+, `googleapis`, `pg`, `zod`, `handlebars`, Jest
   → Target: Sophisticated 9-stage classification pipeline migration
2. Load design documents:
   → data-model.md: 14 core entities with enhanced audit trail schema
   → contracts/: 3 service APIs (classification-engine, email-processor, digest-generator)
   → research.md: Technology decisions and parallel processing strategies
3. Generate tasks by category:
   → Setup: monorepo packages, TypeScript config, database schema
   → Tests: 9 contract tests, 8 integration tests, explainability validation
   → Core: 9 classification stages, Gmail integration, configuration system
   → Integration: database operations, parallel processing, audit trails
   → Polish: performance validation, classification accuracy, digest generation
4. Apply task rules:
   → Different packages/files = mark [P] for parallel
   → Classification stages = sequential (pipeline dependencies)
   → Tests before implementation (TDD)
5. Number tasks sequentially (T001-T047)
6. Generate dependency graph with constitutional compliance
7. Create parallel execution examples with batch operations
8. Validate task completeness:
   → All 3 contracts have tests ✓
   → All 14 entities have models ✓
   → All 9 pipeline stages implemented ✓
9. Return: SUCCESS (47 tasks ready for execution)
```

## Format: `[ID] [P?] Description`

- **[P]**: Can run in parallel (different files, no dependencies)
- Include exact file paths in descriptions

## Path Conventions

- **New Packages**: `packages/classification-engine/`, `packages/email-processor/`
- **Legacy Source**: `packages/workflow-logic/` (extraction source)
- **Configuration**: `config/` directory preserved with enhanced validation
- **Database**: `database/` for PostgreSQL schema enhancements

## Phase 3.1: Setup and Infrastructure

- [ ] T001 Create monorepo package structure for classification-engine and email-processor
- [ ] T002 [P] Initialize TypeScript configuration in packages/classification-engine/tsconfig.json
- [ ] T003 [P] Initialize TypeScript configuration in packages/email-processor/tsconfig.json
- [ ] T004 [P] Configure Jest testing framework in packages/classification-engine/jest.config.js
- [ ] T005 [P] Configure Jest testing framework in packages/email-processor/jest.config.js
- [ ] T006 Install and configure dependencies (googleapis, pg, zod, handlebars) in package.json
- [ ] T007 Create database schema migration for parallel processing in database/migrations/add-parallel-processing.sql

## Phase 3.2: Contract Tests First (TDD) ⚠️ MUST COMPLETE BEFORE 3.3

**CRITICAL: These tests MUST be written and MUST FAIL before ANY implementation**

- [ ] T008 [P] Classification Engine batch endpoint test in packages/classification-engine/tests/api/batch-classification.test.ts
- [ ] T009 [P] Classification Engine single email test in packages/classification-engine/tests/api/single-classification.test.ts
- [ ] T010 [P] Classification Engine config validation test in packages/classification-engine/tests/api/config-validation.test.ts
- [ ] T011 [P] Email Processor unclassified processing test in packages/email-processor/tests/api/process-unclassified.test.ts
- [ ] T012 [P] Email Processor Gmail fetch test in packages/email-processor/tests/api/gmail-fetch.test.ts
- [ ] T013 [P] Email Processor session management test in packages/email-processor/tests/api/session-management.test.ts
- [ ] T014 [P] Digest Generator template rendering test in packages/email-processor/tests/api/digest-generation.test.ts
- [ ] T015 [P] Digest Generator schedule management test in packages/email-processor/tests/api/digest-schedule.test.ts

## Phase 3.3: Data Models and Types (After Tests Fail)

- [ ] T016 [P] EmailMessage entity with Gmail API payload in packages/classification-engine/src/types/email-message.ts
- [ ] T017 [P] ClassificationSession entity with performance metrics in packages/classification-engine/src/types/classification-session.ts
- [ ] T018 [P] EmailClassification entity with explainability in packages/classification-engine/src/types/email-classification.ts
- [ ] T019 [P] ExplainabilityTrace entity with 9-stage results in packages/classification-engine/src/types/explainability-trace.ts
- [ ] T020 [P] ScoreBreakdown entity with parallel computation tracking in packages/classification-engine/src/types/score-breakdown.ts
- [ ] T021 [P] AttributeContext entity with detection metadata in packages/classification-engine/src/types/attribute-context.ts
- [ ] T022 [P] CategoryConfiguration entity with Zod validation in packages/classification-engine/src/types/category-configuration.ts
- [ ] T023 [P] EmailDigest entity with template data in packages/email-processor/src/types/email-digest.ts

## Phase 3.4: Configuration System and Schema Validation

- [ ] T024 [P] Zod schema for CategoryConfiguration in packages/classification-engine/src/config/category-config-schema.ts
- [ ] T025 [P] Zod schema for ProcessingConfig in packages/classification-engine/src/config/processing-config-schema.ts
- [ ] T026 Configuration loader with hot-reload in packages/classification-engine/src/config/config-loader.ts
- [ ] T027 Configuration validation service in packages/classification-engine/src/config/config-validator.ts

## Phase 3.5: Classification Pipeline Stages (Sequential - Pipeline Dependencies)

- [ ] T028 Hard assertions stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/hard-assertions.ts
- [ ] T029 Strong indicators stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/strong-indicators.ts
- [ ] T030 Rule-based scoring stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/rule-scoring.ts
- [ ] T031 Attribute detection stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/attribute-detection.ts
- [ ] T032 Attribute influence stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/attribute-influence.ts
- [ ] T033 Disambiguation stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/disambiguation.ts
- [ ] T034 Multi-label selection stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/multi-label-selection.ts
- [ ] T035 AI routing stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/ai-routing.ts
- [ ] T036 Audit trail generation stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/audit-trail.ts

## Phase 3.6: Gmail Integration and Core Services

- [ ] T037 [P] Gmail API client with authentication in packages/email-processor/src/gmail/gmail-client.ts
- [ ] T038 [P] Gmail email fetcher with pagination in packages/email-processor/src/gmail/email-fetcher.ts
- [ ] T039 [P] Database connection pool configuration in packages/email-processor/src/database/connection-pool.ts
- [ ] T040 Email processing orchestrator in packages/email-processor/src/orchestrator/email-processor.ts

input.thought:
I need to analyze the tasks list to identify the critical path for a minimally runnable integrated solution. Let me trace through the dependencies and identify the earliest point where we have a complete end-to-end workflow.

Looking at the task structure:
- T001-T007: Setup and infrastructure
- T008-T015: Contract tests (must fail first)

- T024-T027: Configuration system
- T028-T036: Classification pipeline stages (9 stages, sequential)
- T037-T041: Gmail integration and orchestration
- T042-T044: Persistence layer
- T045-T047: Digest generation

For a minimally runnable integrated solution, we need:
1. Basic infrastructure (T001-T007)
2. Core data types (T016-T023)
3. Configuration system (T024-T027)
4. At least the core classification stages working
5. Gmail integration (T037-T038)
6. Basic orchestration (T040-T041)
7. Database persistence (T042-T044)

The key insight is that we don't need ALL 9 classification stages to have a runnable system - we could have a minimal classification with just a few stages. But looking at the architecture, the orchestrator (T040) requires all pipeline stages (T028-T036) to be complete.

Let me identify the exact point...

Based on my analysis of the task dependencies and critical path, the code would be runnable as an integrated solution **after T043** (Classification results persistence).

## Critical Path to Runnable System

**Minimum Required Tasks: T001 → T043**

Here's what you'd have at that point:

### Core Functionality Available After T043:
1. **Complete Email Processing Pipeline**:
   - Fetch emails from Gmail API (T037-T038)
   - Process through all 9 sophisticated classification stages (T028-T036)
   - Store results with complete audit trails (T042-T043)

2. **Full Orchestration**:
   - Email processing orchestrator (T040)
   - Classification integration (T041)
   - Batch processing capabilities

3. **Sophisticated Classification**:
   - All 9 pipeline stages: hard assertions, strong indicators, rule scoring, attribute detection, attribute influence, disambiguation, multi-label selection, AI routing, audit trails
   - Configuration-driven rules with Zod validation
   - Complete explainability traces

### What You Could Do After T043:
```bash
# Process unclassified emails
npm run process:emails -- --batch-size 10 --mode parallel

# Classify specific emails
node packages/email-processor/dist/cli/process-single.js --email-id <gmail-message-id>

# Check processing session results
# View classification results in database
```

## Why T043 is the Critical Point:

**T040 (orchestrator) has a hard dependency** on T028-T036 (all classification stages). The tasks specify: *"T040 requires T028-T036 (orchestrator needs all stages)"*

This means you can't have partial functionality with just some classification stages - the architecture requires the complete sophisticated pipeline to be operational.

## Optional Enhancements (T044-T047):
- **T044**: Session management (nice-to-have for tracking)
- **T045-T047**: Digest generation (separate feature for email summaries)

These add valuable functionality but aren't required for the core email processing and classification capabilities.

**Summary**: After completing T043, you'd have a fully functional email classification system that meets the constitutional requirements and performance goals, capable of processing emails end-to-end with sophisticated classification and audit trails.

The user is asking whether the resulting application will allow processing emails that are already in the database (rather than freshly fetched from Gmail). This is indeed very useful for testing, debugging, and tuning because:

2. You can reprocess the same emails with different configurations
3. You can debug classification issues on known problematic emails
4. You can tune classification rules iteratively

However, looking more carefully, there might be a gap: the system seems focused on Gmail message IDs rather than database record IDs. For true reprocessing capability, you'd want to be able to:

Yes, the resulting application will support processing emails already in the database, though the current tasks may need slight enhancement for optimal testing/debugging workflows.

## Current Capabilities (From Tasks T001-T043):

**Partial Support via `/process/batch` endpoint:**
- **T011**: Tests batch processing by email IDs  
- **T040**: Orchestrator handles both fresh fetches and ID-based processing
- **T042**: Persistence layer with batch operations for storing/retrieving emails

From the contracts, you can already:
```bash
# Process specific emails by Gmail message ID
POST /process/batch
{
  "emailIds": ["gmail-msg-id-1", "gmail-msg-id-2"],
  "processingMode": "parallel"
}

# Or single email processing
node packages/email-processor/dist/cli/process-single.js --email-id <gmail-message-id>
```

## What's Missing for Optimal Testing/Debugging:

The current design focuses on **Gmail message IDs** rather than **database record queries**. For comprehensive testing and tuning, you'd want additional capabilities:

```bash
# Query and reprocess by database criteria (NOT currently in tasks)
npm run reprocess -- --date-range "2024-01-01:2024-01-31"
npm run reprocess -- --category "newsletter" --confidence-below 0.7
npm run reprocess -- --sender "example.com" --unclassified-only
```

## Recommended Task Additions:

To fully support your testing/debugging needs, consider adding:

**T048**: Database email query service in `packages/email-processor/src/persistence/email-query.ts`
- Query emails by date range, sender, category, confidence level
- Support for "reprocess-able" email selection

**T049**: Reprocessing CLI commands in `packages/email-processor/src/cli/reprocess.ts`  
- `--date-range`, `--category`, `--confidence-below` flags
- Batch reprocessing with configuration updates

**T050**: Configuration comparison tools for A/B testing classification changes

## Immediate Workaround:

Even without the additional tasks, you can achieve reprocessing by:

1. **Querying database directly** for Gmail message IDs:
   ```sql
   SELECT id FROM email_message WHERE processed_at > '2024-01-01';
   ```

2. **Using the batch endpoint** with those IDs:
   ```bash
   POST /process/batch {"emailIds": ["id1", "id2", ...]}
   ```

This gives you the core reprocessing capability for testing and debugging, just with a manual database query step.

# Tasks: Email Processing Architecture Modernization

**Input**: Design documents from `/workspaces/gmail-automation/specs/001-n8n-to-direct-migration/`
**Prerequisites**: plan.md (required), research.md, data-model.md, contracts/

## Execution Flow (main)

```
1. Load plan.md from feature directory
   → Extract: Node.js 18+, TypeScript 5.0+, `googleapis`, `pg`, `zod`, `handlebars`, Jest
   → Target: Sophisticated 9-stage classification pipeline migration
2. Load design documents:
   → data-model.md: 14 core entities with enhanced audit trail schema
   → contracts/: 3 service APIs (classification-engine, email-processor, digest-generator)
   → research.md: Technology decisions and parallel processing strategies
3. Generate tasks by category:
   → Setup: monorepo packages, TypeScript config, database schema
   → Tests: 9 contract tests, 8 integration tests, explainability validation
   → Core: 9 classification stages, Gmail integration, configuration system
   → Integration: database operations, parallel processing, audit trails
   → Polish: performance validation, classification accuracy, digest generation
4. Apply task rules:
   → Different packages/files = mark [P] for parallel
   → Classification stages = sequential (pipeline dependencies)
   → Tests before implementation (TDD)
5. Number tasks sequentially (T001-T047)
6. Generate dependency graph with constitutional compliance
7. Create parallel execution examples with batch operations
8. Validate task completeness:
   → All 3 contracts have tests ✓
   → All 14 entities have models ✓
   → All 9 pipeline stages implemented ✓
9. Return: SUCCESS (47 tasks ready for execution)
```

## Format: `[ID] [P?] Description`

- **[P]**: Can run in parallel (different files, no dependencies)
- Include exact file paths in descriptions

## Path Conventions

- **New Packages**: `packages/classification-engine/`, `packages/email-processor/`
- **Legacy Source**: `packages/workflow-logic/` (extraction source)
- **Configuration**: `config/` directory preserved with enhanced validation
- **Database**: `database/` for PostgreSQL schema enhancements

## Phase 3.1: Setup and Infrastructure

- [ ] T001 Create monorepo package structure for classification-engine and email-processor
- [ ] T002 [P] Initialize TypeScript configuration in packages/classification-engine/tsconfig.json
- [ ] T003 [P] Initialize TypeScript configuration in packages/email-processor/tsconfig.json
- [ ] T004 [P] Configure Jest testing framework in packages/classification-engine/jest.config.js
- [ ] T005 [P] Configure Jest testing framework in packages/email-processor/jest.config.js
- [ ] T006 Install and configure dependencies (googleapis, pg, zod, handlebars) in package.json
- [ ] T007 Create database schema migration for parallel processing in database/migrations/add-parallel-processing.sql

## Phase 3.2: Contract Tests First (TDD) ⚠️ MUST COMPLETE BEFORE 3.3

**CRITICAL: These tests MUST be written and MUST FAIL before ANY implementation**

- [ ] T008 [P] Classification Engine batch endpoint test in packages/classification-engine/tests/api/batch-classification.test.ts
- [ ] T009 [P] Classification Engine single email test in packages/classification-engine/tests/api/single-classification.test.ts

- [ ] T015 [P] Digest Generator schedule management test in packages/email-processor/tests/api/digest-schedule.test.ts

## Phase 3.3: Data Models and Types (After Tests Fail)

- [ ] T017 [P] ClassificationSession entity with performance metrics in packages/classification-engine/src/types/classification-session.ts

- [ ] T023 [P] EmailDigest entity with template data in packages/email-processor/src/types/email-digest.ts

## Phase 3.4: Configuration System and Schema Validation

- [ ] T025 [P] Zod schema for ProcessingConfig in packages/classification-engine/src/config/processing-config-schema.ts
- [ ] T026 Configuration loader with hot-reload in packages/classification-engine/src/config/config-loader.ts
- [ ] T027 Configuration validation service in packages/classification-engine/src/config/config-validator.ts

## Phase 3.5: Classification Pipeline Stages (Sequential - Pipeline Dependencies)

- [ ] T028 Hard assertions stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/hard-assertions.ts
- [ ] T029 Strong indicators stage in packages/classification-engine/src/stages/strong-indicators.ts

- [ ] T046 [P] Digest generator with category grouping in packages/email-processor/src/digest/digest-generator.ts
- [ ] T047 [P] SMTP delivery service in packages/email-processor/src/digest/email-delivery.ts

   → contracts/: 3 service APIs (classification-engine, email-processor, digest-generator)
   → research.md: Technology decisions and parallel processing strategies
3. Generate tasks by category:
   → Setup: monorepo packages, TypeScript config, database schema
   → Tests: 9 contract tests, 8 integration tests, explainability validation
   → Core: 9 classification stages, Gmail integration, configuration system
   → Integration: database operations, parallel processing, audit trails

4. Apply task rules:
   → Different packages/files = mark [P] for parallel

5. Number tasks sequentially (T001-T047)

## Execution Flow (main)

```
1. Load plan.md from feature directory
   → Extract: Node.js 18+, TypeScript 5.0+, `googleapis`, `pg`, `zod`, `handlebars`, Jest
   → Target: Sophisticated 9-stage classification pipeline migration
2. Load design documents:
   → data-model.md: 14 core entities with enhanced audit trail schema
   → contracts/: 3 service APIs (classification-engine, email-processor, digest-generator)
   → research.md: Technology decisions and parallel processing strategies
3. Generate tasks by category:
   → Setup: monorepo packages, TypeScript config, database schema
   → Tests: 9 contract tests, 8 integration tests, explainability validation
   → Core: 9 classification stages, Gmail integration, configuration system
   → Integration: database operations, parallel processing, audit trails
   → Polish: performance validation, classification accuracy, digest generation
4. Apply task rules:
   → Different packages/files = mark [P] for parallel
   → Classification stages = sequential (pipeline dependencies)
   → Tests before implementation (TDD)
